channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KPIGREEN] KPI Green Energy gets CERC inter-state power trading licence
item.description:
🔥 Trending

KPI Green Energy Limited has been granted an Inter-State Power Trading Licence (Category IV) by the Central Electricity Regulatory Commission (CERC). This new licence, combined with its existing intra-state licence from the Gujarat Electricity Regulatory Commission (GERC), enables the company to undertake power trading across India and establish a comprehensive pan-India power trading platform. This development is expected to strengthen KPI Green Energy's ability to operate seamlessly across markets, respond to evolving demand patterns, enhance flexibility in power sales, and support better price discovery. The licence will allow the company to access demand centres across multiple states, dynamically allocate power based on market conditions, engage with a wider spectrum of customers, and participate in exchange-led and short-term markets, thereby unlocking greater value from its growing renewable energy portfolio.

  • KPI Green Energy received an Inter-State Power Trading Licence from CERC.
  • This enables pan-India power trading, complementing its intra-state licence.
  • The licence enhances flexibility in power sales and improves price discovery.
  • It allows access to diverse demand centers and wider customer engagement.
  • Positions the company to unlock greater value from its renewable energy portfolio.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KPI Green Energy Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [PAYTM*] Paytm approves ₹90 Cr Default Loss Guarantee; converts ₹197 Cr FGTPL loan
item.description:
One 97 Communications Ltd (Paytm) has approved a Default Loss Guarantee of up to ₹90 crore on loans disbursed by its lending partner, aligning with its loan distribution business model. Additionally, the company approved the conversion of an outstanding loan of approximately ₹197 crore, including unpaid interest, into 19,67,70,855 equity shares of its step-down subsidiary, First Games Technology Private Limited (FGTPL). FGTPL had ceased its online real money gaming business in August 2025 due to regulatory changes, and Paytm had previously fully impaired its investment in FGTPL. This conversion will increase Paytm's direct and indirect shareholding in FGTPL from 55% to 82.6% on a fully diluted basis, with no fresh financial impact on the company.

  • Paytm approved a Default Loss Guarantee of up to ₹90 crore for lending partners.
  • ₹197 crore loan to FGTPL converted into equity, increasing Paytm's stake.
  • FGTPL's online gaming business was discontinued due to regulatory changes.
  • The loan conversion has no fresh financial impact on One 97 Communications.
  • Paytm's shareholding in FGTPL rises from 55% to 82.6% post-conversion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: One 97 Communications Ltd | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [ABANSENT] Abans Enterprises withdraws amalgamation scheme with Abans Jewels
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Abans Enterprises Ltd has officially withdrawn its Scheme of Amalgamation with its wholly-owned subsidiary, Abans Jewels Limited. The company had previously informed about the Audit Committee and Board of Directors' approval for this withdrawal on February 5, 2026. The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, has now disposed of the application for the scheme as withdrawn, following the companies' resolution to withdraw the petition. This concludes the process of discontinuing the proposed merger under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013.

  • Abans Enterprises officially withdrew its amalgamation scheme.
  • NCLT Mumbai Bench approved the withdrawal of the scheme application.
  • The scheme involved wholly-owned subsidiary Abans Jewels Limited.
  • The Board had approved the withdrawal earlier in February 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Abans Enterprises Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [WIPRO] Wipro Submits Auditor's Report for Q4 & FY26 Financials
item.description:
Wipro Ltd. has submitted the independent auditor's reports for its standalone financial statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. These reports, which include the Unique Document Identification Number (UDIN), are a continuation of the financial statements previously filed on April 16, 2026. Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP, the appointed auditor, has issued an unqualified opinion, affirming that the financial results present a true and fair view in accordance with Indian Accounting Standard 34 (Ind AS 34) and the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The reports confirm compliance with applicable accounting principles and regulatory requirements.

  • Wipro submitted auditor's reports for Q4 and FY26 financial statements.
  • Reports include Unique Document Identification Number (UDIN).
  • Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP issued an unqualified audit opinion.
  • Financial results conform to Ind AS 34 and SEBI LODR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WIPRO LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [BIRET] Brookfield India REIT opens institutional placement at ₹329.94 floor price
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT has announced the opening of its institutional placement today, April 16, 2026. This follows unitholder approval received on April 7, 2026, for raising funds through such an issue. The Issue Committee of the Manager approved the opening, adopted the Preliminary Placement Document, and set the floor price at ₹329.94 per unit. The relevant date for the issue is also April 16, 2026. The trading window for designated persons will remain closed until further notice, in compliance with insider trading regulations.

  • Brookfield India REIT opened its institutional placement on April 16, 2026.
  • Unitholders approved the fund-raising on April 7, 2026.
  • The floor price for the issue is set at ₹329.94 per unit.
  • A Preliminary Placement Document has been approved and adopted.
  • Trading window remains closed for designated persons.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT | Category: Investment

item.title: [DCXINDIA] DCX Systems bags ₹9.30 Cr order for Transmitter Receiver Modules from IAI-ELTA
item.description:
DCX Systems Ltd has announced the receipt of new purchase orders totaling approximately ₹9.30 Crores. These orders, received in the normal course of business, are for the manufacture and supply of Transmitter Receiver Modules. The customer for these orders is IAI-ELTA Systems Limited, based in Israel. This development contributes to the company's order book and provides revenue visibility, underscoring its ongoing operational activities and client engagements in the defense and aerospace sector.

  • DCX Systems secured new purchase orders worth ₹9.30 Crores.
  • Orders are for the manufacture and supply of Transmitter Receiver Modules.
  • The customer is IAI-ELTA Systems Limited, an Israeli firm.
  • This enhances the company's order book and revenue visibility.
  • Reflects ongoing business operations and client relationships.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCX Systems Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PAYTM*] Paytm converts 197 Cr FGTPL loan to equity, stake to 82.6%; approves 90 Cr DLG
item.description:
🔥 Trending

One 97 Communications Ltd (Paytm) has approved the conversion of an outstanding loan, along with unpaid interest, totaling approximately 197 crore, to its step-down subsidiary, First Games Technology Private Limited (FGTPL), into 19,67,70,855 equity shares. This conversion will increase Paytm's aggregate direct and indirect shareholding in FGTPL from 55% to 82.6% on a fully diluted basis. FGTPL had previously discontinued its online real money gaming business due to regulatory changes, and Paytm had fully impaired its investment. The company stated that this conversion has no fresh financial impact. Additionally, Paytm approved a Default Loss Guarantee of up to 90 crore on loans disbursed by its lending partners, aligning with its loan distribution business model.

  • Paytm converts 197 Cr loan to FGTPL into equity shares.
  • Direct and indirect shareholding in FGTPL increases from 55% to 82.6%.
  • FGTPL's online gaming business was discontinued due to regulatory changes.
  • The loan conversion has no fresh financial impact on Paytm.
  • Company approved 90 Cr Default Loss Guarantee for lending partners.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: One 97 Communications Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ANGELONE] Angel One: Board approves FY26 results, ₹20,000 Cr borrowing limit hike
item.description:
Angel One Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 16, 2026, approved the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with an unmodified auditor's opinion. The company had raised ₹50 Crores through private placement of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) during Q4 FY26. Key approvals include increasing borrowing limits up to ₹20,000 Crores under Sections 180(1)(c), 180(1)(a), and 186 of the Companies Act, 2013, subject to shareholder approval. The Board also approved raising an additional ₹1,500 Crores via NCDs and investing ₹150 Crores each in its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Angel Fincap Private Limited and Angel One Wealth Limited. M/s. KPMG Assurance and Consulting Services LLP were appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27, and the 30th Annual General Meeting is scheduled for June 12, 2026.

  • Board approved Q4 and FY26 audited standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Company increased borrowing limits to ₹20,000 Cr, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Approved raising up to ₹1,500 Cr via NCDs through private placement.
  • Invested ₹150 Cr each in Angel Fincap and Angel One Wealth subsidiaries.
  • KPMG Assurance appointed as Internal Auditors for FY2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Angel One Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GTV] GTV Engineering Shareholders Approve Preferential Issue (Non-Cash)
item.description:
GTV Engineering Ltd. announced that its shareholders, at the 1st Extra-Ordinary General Meeting held on April 16, 2026, approved the preferential issue of equity shares. This approval follows a resolution passed by the Board of Directors at their meeting on March 23, 2026. The shares will be issued on a preferential basis for a consideration other than cash, in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Shareholders approved preferential issue of equity shares.
  • The issue is for consideration other than cash.
  • Approval was granted at the EOGM on April 16, 2026.
  • The Board had approved the proposal on March 23, 2026.
  • The action complies with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GTV Engineering Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [EMERALD] Emerald Finance Partners for Early-Wage-Access Program
item.description:
Emerald Finance Ltd has partnered with Providence Outsourcing India Pvt. Ltd. to introduce an Early-Wage-Access (EWA) program for its employees. This program is designed to offer immediate financial relief by enabling employees to access a portion of their salaries seamlessly throughout the month. The company's broader vision includes expanding its offerings to serve retail customers with similar salary advance solutions, where short-term loans are provided to employees through employer tie-ups and collected via salary deductions. This move aligns with Emerald Finance's strategic goal to broaden its financial product portfolio.

  • Emerald Finance partnered with Providence Outsourcing for EWA.
  • Program offers instant financial relief to employees.
  • Company aims to expand salary advance solutions to retail.
  • Loans will be collected through salary deductions.
  • Strategic move to broaden financial product offerings.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Emerald Leasing Finance & Investment Company Ltd | Category: Partnership
